posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy new year community!
Here’s what’s new in the monday Apps Framework and API from the past month

Apps Framework:
Marketplace Shield Badge: We added a Shield Badge which is awarded to apps that meet specific data protection requirements.
Marketplace app rating update: Average app rating score will be calculated using the app’s lifetime ratings, not only ratings within the past year.
New webhook field: app_name
New CLI command: Remove an account’s storage data for specific account
New ability to search storage: You can now search for stored records in our SDK and CLI tools

API:
New Assign & Remove team owners
Fix: Column validation for apps
New update_email_domain mutation
Improved: Rate limits
New timeline object: you can now query emails & activities of specific item
New activcate_users mutation

Stay tuned for 2025 new updates and features!
